misc.title: I think the next arc will be the climax of the Pirate Saga, built up by the "Man with the Burned Scar"which will lead to the Four Emperors event, where they will clash against one another in a battle
misc.text: I think the next arc will be the climax of the Pirate Saga, built up by the "Man with the Burned Scar"which will lead to the Four Emperors event, where they will clash against one another in a battle royale. The next arc is going to be the absolute peak of the entire pirate era!

misc.text: For me, the question is when and where within the storyline, this fight will be placed (because it *has* to happen)? Theoretically, it would make sense for it to occur during the race for the title of Pirate King. When do you guys think Zoro vs. Mihawk will take place? Geo (@Geo_AW) this gonna be zoro when he finally beat mihawk — https://nitter.net/Geo_AW/status/2062398603331518669#m
